PowerShell($dir = "C:\\Users\\ASUS\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\D--laragon-www-Voting\\98b4ec67-27b6-4895-89ae-501b8c6c825a\\scratchpad"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\(200,200\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.Clear\([System.Drawing.Color]::FromArgb\(56,189,248\)\); $brush = New-Object System.Drawing.SolidBrush\([System.Drawing.Color]::FromArgb\(15,23,42\)\); $g.FillEllipse\($brush, 60, 40, 80, 80\); $g.FillEllipse\($brush, 40, 130, 120, 90\); $bmp.Save\("$dir\\foto-uji.png", [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); "PNG dibuat: $\(\(Get-Item "$dir\\foto-uji.png"\).Length\) bytes")

PowerShell($dir = "C:\\Users\\ASUS\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\D--laragon-www-Voting\\98b4ec67-27b6-4895-89ae-501b8c6c825a\\scratchpad"; curl.exe -s -c "$dir\\cookies.txt" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{\\"mode\\":\\"petugas\\",\\"kolomId\\":1,\\"kode\\":\\"kolom1\\"}' http://localhost:3123/api/login; curl.exe -s -b "$dir\\cookies.txt" -F "id=5" -F "foto=@$dir\\foto-uji.png;type=image/png" http://localhost:3123/api/petugas/kandidat/foto; curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "status foto: %{http_code}, tipe: %{content_type}" "http://localhost:3123/api/foto/5?v=1")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem D:\\laragon\\bin -Directory | Select-Object Name; \(Get-Command mongod -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Get-Process mongod -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Id)

PowerShell($cmd = Get-Command mongod -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cmd\) { "mongod ditemukan: $\($cmd.Source\)" } else { "mongod TIDAK ada di PATH" }; $p = Get-Process mongod -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "mongod BERJALAN \(PID $\($p.Id\)\)" } else { "mongod tidak berjalan" }; Test-Path D:\\laragon\\bin\\mongodb)

PowerShell($dir = "C:\\Users\\ASUS\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\D--laragon-www-Voting\\98b4ec67-27b6-4895-89ae-501b8c6c825a\\scratchpad"; curl.exe -s -c "$dir\\ckadm.txt" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{\\"mode\\":\\"admin\\",\\"password\\":\\"admin123\\"}' http://localhost:3123/api/login; "`n--- admin kolom \(3 pertama\) ---"; $adm = curl.exe -s -b "$dir\\ckadm.txt" http://localhost:3123/api/admin/kolom | ConvertFrom-Json; $adm.kolom[0..2] | ConvertTo-Json -Compress)

PowerShell($r = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3123/api/quickcount" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; "Total suara: $\($r.totalSuara\), kolom selesai: $\($r.kolomSelesai\), jumlah kolom: $\($r.kolom.Count\)")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $sw = [Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew\(\); $r = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3123/api/quickcount" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $sw.Stop\(\); "Durasi: $\($sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds\)s | Total suara: $\($r.totalSuara\), kolom selesai: $\($r.kolomSelesai\), jumlah kolom: $\($r.kolom.Count\)")

PowerShell($sw = [Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew\(\); $r = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3123/api/quickcount" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 90\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $sw.Stop\(\); "Durasi: $\([math]::Round\($sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds,1\)\)s | Total suara: $\($r.totalSuara\), kolom selesai: $\($r.kolomSelesai\), jumlah kolom: $\($r.kolom.Count\)"; $sw.Restart\(\); $r2 = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3123/api/quickcount" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $sw.Stop\(\); "Permintaan kedua: $\([math]::Round\($sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds,2\)\)s")

PowerShell($dir = "C:\\Users\\ASUS\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\D--laragon-www-Voting\\98b4ec67-27b6-4895-89ae-501b8c6c825a\\scratchpad"; curl.exe -s -c "$dir\\ckadm.txt" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{\\"mode\\":\\"admin\\",\\"password\\":\\"admin123\\"}' http://localhost:3123/api/login; "`n--- ubah ke 21 ---"; curl.exe -s -b "$dir\\ckadm.txt" -X PUT -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{\\"jumlah\\":21}' http://localhost:3123/api/admin/kolom; "`n--- cek jumlah ---"; \(\(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3123/api/quickcount" -UseBasicParsing\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).kolom.Count)

PowerShell($dir = "C:\\Users\\ASUS\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\D--laragon-www-Voting\\98b4ec67-27b6-4895-89ae-501b8c6c825a\\scratchpad"; "--- kembali ke 19 ---"; curl.exe -s -b "$dir\\ckadm.txt" -X PUT -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{\\"jumlah\\":19}' http://localhost:3123/api/admin/kolom; "`n--- cek jumlah & data lama utuh ---"; $r = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3123/api/quickcount" -UseBasicParsing\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; "kolom: $\($r.kolom.Count\), total suara: $\($r.totalSuara\), selesai: $\($r.kolomSelesai\)")

PowerShell($dir = "C:\\Users\\ASUS\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\D--laragon-www-Voting\\98b4ec67-27b6-4895-89ae-501b8c6c825a\\scratchpad"; curl.exe -s -c "$dir\\ck3.txt" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{\\"mode\\":\\"petugas\\",\\"kolomId\\":3,\\"kode\\":\\"kolom3\\"}' http://localhost:3123/api/login; "`n--- tambah 3 calon penatua ---"; foreach \($n in @\('Calon A','Calon B','Calon C'\)\) { curl.exe -s -b "$dir\\ck3.txt" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d \('{\\"nama\\":\\"' + $n + '\\",\\"jabatan\\":\\"penatua\\"}'\) http://localhost:3123/api/petugas/kandidat; "" })

PowerShell($dir = "C:\\Users\\ASUS\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\D--laragon-www-Voting\\98b4ec67-27b6-4895-89ae-501b8c6c825a\\scratchpad"; $ids = @{ A = '6a54f58e6e94fe3588440dbd'; B = '6a54f58e6e94fe3588440dbe'; C = '6a54f58e6e94fe3588440dbf' }; foreach \($x in 1..3\) { curl.exe -s -b "$dir\\ck3.txt" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d \('{\\"kandidatId\\":\\"' + $ids.A + '\\",\\"delta\\":1}'\) http://localhost:3123/api/petugas/tally | Out-Null }; foreach \($x in 1..2\) { curl.exe -s -b "$dir\\ck3.txt" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d \('{\\"kandidatId\\":\\"' + $ids.B + '\\",\\"delta\\":1}'\) http://localhost:3123/api/petugas/tally | Out-Null }; curl.exe -s -b "$dir\\ck3.txt" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d \('{\\"kandidatId\\":\\"' + $ids.C + '\\",\\"delta\\":1}'\) http://localhost:3123/api/petugas/tally; "`n--- aklamasi ---"; curl.exe -s -b "$dir\\ck3.txt" -X POST http://localhost:3123/api/petugas/aklamasi)

PowerShell($r = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3123/api/quickcount" -UseBasicParsing\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $k3 = $r.kolom | Where-Object { $_.id -eq 3 }; "tahap: $\($k3.tahap\)"; "penatua: " + \(\($k3.penatua | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.nama\)=$\($_.suara\)" }\) -join ', '\); "diaken: " + \(\($k3.diaken | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.nama\)=$\($_.suara\) aklamasi=$\($_.aklamasi\)" }\) -join ', '\))

PowerShell($dir = "C:\\Users\\ASUS\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\D--laragon-www-Voting\\98b4ec67-27b6-4895-89ae-501b8c6c825a\\scratchpad"; "--- aklamasi saat sudah selesai \(harus ditolak\) ---"; curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "%{http_code}" -b "$dir\\ck3.txt" -X POST http://localhost:3123/api/petugas/aklamasi)

PowerShell($dir = "C:\\Users\\ASUS\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\D--laragon-www-Voting\\98b4ec67-27b6-4895-89ae-501b8c6c825a\\scratchpad"; curl.exe -s -b "$dir\\ck3.txt" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{\\"tahap\\":\\"diaken\\"}' http://localhost:3123/api/petugas/tahap | Out-Null; curl.exe -s -b "$dir\\ck3.txt" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{\\"tahap\\":\\"penatua\\"}' http://localhost:3123/api/petugas/tahap | Out-Null; $st = curl.exe -s -b "$dir\\ck3.txt" http://localhost:3123/api/petugas | ConvertFrom-Json; foreach \($k in @\($st.penatua\) + @\($st.diaken\)\) { curl.exe -s -b "$dir\\ck3.txt" -X DELETE -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d \('{\\"id\\":\\"' + $k.id + '\\"}'\) http://localhost:3123/api/petugas/kandidat | Out-Null }; $st2 = curl.exe -s -b "$dir\\ck3.txt" http://localhost:3123/api/petugas | ConvertFrom-Json; "tahap: $\($st2.kolom.tahap\), penatua: $\($st2.penatua.Count\), diaken: $\($st2.diaken.Count\)")
